headline: Kinder Morgan’s US$10b Backlog Meets Fair Value And Cash Flow Questions
summary: Kinder Morgan (NYSE:KMI) has expanded its natural gas project backlog to $10 billion, adding $900 million in new projects. The expanded, post-FID pipeline targets long-term demand tied to global LNG exports and rising power needs from data centers. The company highlights a transparent, fee-based project slate that supports its role as a large U.S. natural gas infrastructure provider. For investors watching NYSE:KMI, the larger project backlog comes alongside a share price of $33.92 and...

headline: Kinder Morgan price target raised to $39 from $35 at BofA
summary: BofA raised the firm’s price target on Kinder Morgan (KMI) to $39 from $35 and keeps a Buy rating on the shares. The firm sees more runway for gas levered names and sees additional growth post 2030, the analyst tells investors.
